title: davallia grammatosora
intro: Davallia grammatosora, also known as the Grammatophyllon fern or Grammatosora fern, is a species of fern in the family Davalliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Davallia grammatosora include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a remedy for skin conditions and wounds. Davallia grammatosora is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
